name: Min Cost to Connect All Points
description: Given an array of points on a 2D plane, return the minimum cost to connect all points. The cost of connecting two points is the Manhattan distance |xi - xj| + |yi - yj|. All points must be connected with exactly one simple path.
constraints: 1 <= points.length <= 1000. -10^6 <= xi, yi <= 10^6. All pairs (xi, yi) are distinct.
